heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 410z–5 Authorization of appropriations
text: For the acquisition of lands or interests in lands designated by , as components of the Boston National Historical Park, there is authorized to be appropriated not to exceed $2,740,000. For development of the components designated as paragraphs 1 through 6 in , there is authorized to be appropriated not more than $12,818,000. For the development of the component designated as paragraph 7 in , there is authorized to be appropriated not more than $11,500,000.section 410z of this titlesection 410z of this titlesection 410z of this title
